action_set_definitions.name: get_reactor_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current telemetry data and operational status for a specific reactor unit. Essential for identifying initial conditions before performing operations.

reactor_id.description: The identification code of the reactor (e.g., '304').

action_set_definitions.name: set_liquid_level
action_set_definitions.description: Controls the inlet valves to fill the reactor with water to a specific target percentage.

reactor_id.description: The identifier for the reactor unit.

action_set_definitions.name: set_agitator_power
action_set_definitions.description: Turns the reactor's internal mixing agitator on or off. Required for thermal uniformity.

reactor_id.description: The identifier for the reactor unit.

status.description: True to power on, False to power off.

action_set_definitions.name: update_jacket_setpoint
action_set_definitions.description: Sets the temperature of the external heating/cooling jacket. Note: Adjustments must not exceed 10°C from current value per step.

reactor_id.description: The identifier for the reactor unit.

target_temp.description: The new temperature setpoint for the jacket in degrees Celsius.

action_set_definitions.name: trigger_safety_interlock
action_set_definitions.description: Executes a test of the safety interlock systems to ensure the reactor shuts down or stabilizes during a high-temperature event.

reactor_id.description: The identifier for the reactor unit.

interlock_type.description: The specific safety system to trigger (e.g., 'high_temperature').

state_description.internal_temperature: The current temperature inside the reactor in degrees Celsius.
state_description.internal_pressure: The current pressure inside the reactor in Bar.
state_description.reactant_mass: The mass of the primary reactant currently in the tank (kg).
state_description.product_mass: The mass of the converted product currently in the tank (kg).
state_description.liquid_level: The fill percentage of the reactor tank (0-100%).
state_description.is_agitator_active: Whether the mixing agitator is currently powered on.
state_description.jacket_temperature: The temperature of the heating/cooling jacket surrounding the reactor.
state_description.process_status: The current phase of the batch process (e.g., idle, charging, reacting, discharging).
